name: Easy to Make Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons grated Monterey Jack or Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chopped onion and oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Cook until onions are soft, but not brown.
3. Coarsely chop green chilies, unless they are already chopped, and add to onions.
4. Add refried beans. Stir in chicken broth.
5. Cook and stir until soup is heated through and no lumps remain.
6. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce.
7. Stir in cilantro just before serving.
8. Garnish each serving with grated cheese and sour cream.
Makes 6 servings.
